_readme: Historical Championship bid allocation for the Mid-Atlantic region, Mixed division. Bid counts are confirmed from USA Ultimate / Ultiworld coverage. 'last_bid_team_rating' fields are left null where we could not verify an exact number from public sources — fill in manually if you find a citable figure, but don't guess.

years.notes: AMP (national #2 at the time) and Rally both held Mid-Atlantic's two bids through the season.
Region dropped to a single bid; AMP was the clear favorite to take it.
Region was briefly at risk of the 'two bids for three regions' scenario before ESC; Rally and AMP did enough to secure the region's two bids in the final allocation.
